pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the local community guide, highlighting main categories and quick access to search and saved lists.
primary_functions: Show main navigation entry points for Restaurants & Food, Events, Volunteering, Parks & Outdoors, Home Services, Childcare, and Groups & Clubs
Provide a simple keyword and ZIP code search to jump into relevant listings
Surface featured restaurants, events, services, and parks for quick discovery
Provide quick access to the user's saved lists via a prominent 'My Lists' link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the 'Restaurants & Food' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Events' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Volunteering' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Parks & Outdoors' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Home Services' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Childcare' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'Groups & Clubs' section tile from the homepage hero or main navigation section.
Click on the 'My Lists' entry point in the homepage content (in addition to the header link).
Click on a featured restaurant, service, or park card returned from getHomeFeaturedContent or homeQuickSearch.
Click on a featured event card returned from getHomeFeaturedContent or an event result from homeQuickSearch.
Submit a quick search from the homepage with keyword 'beginner yoga' and select 'Groups' as the content type.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the global header navigation.
Primary landing page, accessible directly via base site URL or bookmarks.

pages.name: Directory Listings
pages.description: Reusable directory page for places and service providers such as restaurants, home services, childcare, and parks.
primary_functions: Allow users to browse and search local places/providers by category (e.g., restaurants_food, home_services, childcare, parks_outdoors)
Filter results by location (ZIP code and distance radius) to support tasks within 3, 5, 8, 10, or 15 miles as needed
Filter by price (e.g., under $20 per person, max hourly rate, max call-out fee) and by rating (e.g., 4.0 stars & up, 4.5 stars & up)
Filter by amenities and features such as family_friendly, takes_reservations, playground, dog_friendly, 24_7_emergency, weekdays_only, and time-of-day availability
Provide schedule filters for services that depend on time (e.g., weekday daytime availability for childcare, date/time availability for restaurants)
Provide sort options such as rating_high_to_low, distance_nearest_first, and price_low_to_high
Display concise result cards showing name, rating, price, distance, key amenities, and any visible fees (e.g., call-out fee)
Link each result to the corresponding place detail page (place_detail.html) so users can view details and save providers to lists

incoming_params.description: DirectoryCategory.id specifying which directory to show; one of 'restaurants_food', 'parks_outdoors', 'home_services', 'childcare'. Required. Provided by header links and homepage tiles.

Optional subcategory for home services or other types (e.g., 'plumber', 'electrician', 'gardener', 'cleaner', 'childcare_provider', 'park'). Helps pre-filter listings for tasks like finding plumbers or electricians.
ZIP code to center the search around (e.g., '12345'). Mapped to the zip_code parameter of searchDirectoryPlaces.
Search radius in miles (e.g., 3, 5, 8, 10, 15) used to constrain results by distance_miles in searchDirectoryPlaces.
Identifier of the selected price range filter (e.g., 'under_20_per_person') mapped to price_ranges.id from getDirectoryFilterOptions.
Minimum rating filter value (e.g., 4.0, 4.5) mapped to rating_min in searchDirectoryPlaces.

Comma-separated amenity keys selected (e.g., 'family_friendly,takes_reservations,has_playground,is_dog_friendly,is_24_7_emergency,supports_weekday_daytime'), mapped to the amenities array parameter in searchDirectoryPlaces.
Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) used for schedule-related searches (e.g., next Friday for restaurant availability). Mapped into the availability object passed to searchDirectoryPlaces.
Optional time in HH:MM 24h format (e.g., '19:00' for 7 PM) used in the availability object of searchDirectoryPlaces.
Sort key for the listing results (e.g., 'rating_high_to_low', 'distance_nearest_first', 'price_low_to_high', 'call_out_fee_low_to_high'), mapped to sort_by for searchDirectoryPlaces.
Pagination page number for the result set, mapped to page in searchDirectoryPlaces.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a place/provider card in the directory results list.
Change of filters, sort order, or pagination controls within the directory, resulting in the same page being reloaded with updated query parameters.
Click 'My Lists' from the global header while on the directory listings page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via header links for 'Restaurants & Food', 'Parks & Outdoors', 'Home Services', and 'Childcare', each passing a fixed categoryId query parameter.
Directly accessible via URLs like 'directory_list.html?categoryId=home_services&subcategory=plumber&zip=12345&radius=10'.

pages.name: Events & Volunteering Listings
pages.description: Listing page for events and volunteering opportunities, supporting time, price, cause, and availability filters.
primary_functions: Allow users to browse and search local events (eventType=events) and volunteering opportunities (eventType=volunteering) by keyword and location (ZIP code and radius)
Filter by single date or date range (e.g., next Saturday, today through one month from today) using a calendar or date pickers
Filter by time of day ranges (e.g., 1:00 PM to 6:00 PM for Saturday afternoon events)
Filter by price, including a 'Free' option or max price of 0 for free events
For volunteering mode, filter by cause/category (e.g., environment) and by spots available (e.g., 10+ spots left or minimum spots=10)
Sort results by soonest_first / date_time and other options as needed
Display event/opportunity cards showing title, date/time, distance, price, cause, and spots remaining where applicable
Link each event or volunteering opportunity to its detail page (event_detail.html) for saving, RSVPs, or contacting the organizer

incoming_params.description: Mode for the page, mapping to searchEvents.mode and getEventFilterOptions.mode. 'events' for standard events and 'volunteering' for volunteering opportunities.
Optional search keyword to filter events/volunteering titles and descriptions.
ZIP code for location-based filtering (e.g., '12345'), mapped to zip_code in searchEvents.
Search radius in miles for distance filtering, mapped to radius_miles in searchEvents.
Single date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD) for event searches when targeting a specific day like 'next Saturday', mapped to date in searchEvents.
Start of date range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD) for volunteering searches (e.g., 'today'). Combined with endDate to form date_range in searchEvents.
End of date range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD) for volunteering searches (e.g., 'one month from today'), combined with startDate into date_range.
Start of time range in HH:MM 24h format (e.g., '13:00' for 1 PM), mapped into time_range.start in searchEvents.
End of time range in HH:MM 24h format (e.g., '18:00' for 6 PM), mapped into time_range.end in searchEvents.
Maximum ticket price filter (e.g., 0 for free events), mapped to price_max in searchEvents.
If true, restricts results to free events only. Mapped to is_free_only in searchEvents.
Volunteering cause filter (e.g., 'environment'), mapped to cause in searchEvents.
Minimum number of spots remaining (e.g., 10) when filtering volunteering opportunities, mapped to min_spots_remaining in searchEvents.
Sort key for event results (e.g., 'soonest_first', 'date_time', 'distance_nearest_first', 'price_low_to_high'), mapped to sort_by in searchEvents.
Pagination page number for event results, mapped to page in searchEvents.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event or volunteering opportunity card in the results list.
Click on a 'View group' link on an event card that is part of a group (e.g., a yoga group's session).
Change filters, date, time-of-day presets, or pagination within the events list, resulting in the same page reloading with updated parameters.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Events' and 'Volunteering' links in the header, which set eventType to 'events' or 'volunteering'.
Accessible by direct URLs such as 'events_list.html?eventType=events&zip=12345&radius=5&date=2026-06-12'.

pages.name: Groups & Clubs Listings
pages.description: Directory of local groups, clubs, and meetups such as beginner yoga or hobby groups.
primary_functions: Allow users to search groups by keyword (e.g., 'beginner yoga')
Filter groups by location (ZIP code and distance radius) to find nearby communities
Filter by experience level or difficulty (e.g., beginner, all_levels) and by meeting schedule such as weekday_evenings
Display group cards summarizing title, brief description, meeting patterns, and approximate location
Link each group to the group detail page (group_detail.html) where users can join and see upcoming sessions

incoming_params.description: Search keyword for groups (e.g., 'beginner yoga'), mapped to keyword in searchGroups.
ZIP code for location-based group searches, mapped to zip_code in searchGroups.
Search radius in miles for groups, mapped to radius_miles in searchGroups.
Experience level filter (e.g., 'beginner', 'all_levels'), mapped to experience_level in searchGroups.
Meeting pattern filter (e.g., 'weekday_evenings', 'weekends'), mapped to meeting_pattern in searchGroups.
Sort key for group results (e.g., 'distance_nearest_first'), mapped to the sort option selected from getGroupFilterOptions.
Pagination page number for group results, mapped to page in searchGroups.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a group card in the groups listing.
Change filters, meeting pattern, or pagination within the groups list, reloading the same page with updated parameters.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Groups & Clubs' link in the header navigation.
Accessible directly via URLs like 'groups_list.html?keyword=beginner+yoga&zip=12345&radius=10'.

pages.name: Place / Provider Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single place or service provider, such as a restaurant, plumber, electrician, cleaner, childcare provider, or park.
primary_functions: Show full details about the place/provider including name, description, address, map, rating, reviews summary, price information, and visible fees (e.g., call-out fee)
Show key attributes relevant to tasks, such as family_friendly, takes_reservations, 24_7_emergency, hourly_rate, playground, dog_friendly, and service coverage radius
Display available schedule or operating hours so users can confirm weekday and time-of-day availability where relevant (e.g., childcare weekdays 8 AM35 PM)

Provide a 'Save', 'Favorite', or 'Add to list' control that lets the user select an existing list (e.g., Family Dinner Friday, Emergency Contacts, Home Services, Childcare Options, Local Parks) or create a new list
Confirm that the place/provider has been added to the chosen list and allow users to navigate to the list detail page (list_detail.html) if desired
Support comparison by clearly showing key numeric details like call-out fee and rating so users can manually compare open tabs (e.g., cheaper of two plumbers)

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Place to display, mapped directly to the placeId parameter in getPlaceDetails.
Optional encoded URL indicating where the 'Back to results' link should return the user (e.g., the originating directory_list or list_detail view).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a generic 'Manage all lists' link near the save controls to review or manage lists before saving.
After using the 'Save/Add to list' control and choosing 'View this list', navigate to the Saved List Detail page for that list.
Click a 'Back to results' link when a returnUrl was not provided; in this case, the page may fall back to the default directory for the place's category.
Click a 'Back to results' link when a returnUrl with a directory_list URL is provided.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user clicks a listing card or saved item, via URLs like 'place_detail.html?placeId=abc123'.
Can be bookmarked or shared as a direct URL to a specific place/provider.

pages.name: Event / Opportunity Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single event, volunteering opportunity, or group session with options to save, RSVP, and contact organizers.
primary_functions: Show comprehensive event information including title, description, date, start and end time, location, distance from the user's ZIP code, and price
For volunteering opportunities, show cause/category (e.g., environment) and the number of spots available to confirm that at least 10 spots remain where required
Provide a 'Save', 'Add to list', or 'Add to itinerary' control to assign the event or opportunity to a user list (e.g., Weekend Plan or other custom lists)
Provide an 'RSVP', 'Attend', or 'Going' action for events and group sessions, allowing the user to confirm their attendance for the next scheduled session

Provide a 'Contact organizer' or 'Send message' form for volunteering opportunities and other events that accept messages, including fields for message text and name (e.g., 'Test User'), and a submit/confirmation flow
Offer links back to the relevant listing page (events_list.html) and to any associated group (group_detail.html) if the event belongs to a group

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Event to display, mapped directly to the eventId parameter in getEventDetails.
Optional encoded URL indicating which listing or group page to return to when the user clicks 'Back'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Manage my lists' near the save controls to open the lists overview.
After using the 'Save/Add to list' control and choosing 'View this list', navigate to the Saved List Detail page.
Click 'Back to events' when no explicit returnUrl is available; event_type is used to return to either Events or Volunteering mode.
Click 'View group' link when the event is associated with a group (e.g., a yoga meetup session).

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking an event card or upcoming session via URLs like 'event_detail.html?eventId=evt123'.
Can be bookmarked or shared as a direct URL for a specific event or volunteering opportunity.

pages.name: Group Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a community group or club (e.g., beginner yoga group) with membership and upcoming sessions.
primary_functions: Display group information including name, description, focus (e.g., yoga), typical experience level (e.g., beginner), and meeting pattern (e.g., weekday evenings)
Show the group's primary location or service area so users know it is within the desired distance
Provide a 'Join group' or 'Become a member' button using the site's built-in, single-user membership logic (no external authentication)
After joining, display a list of upcoming group sessions or events, each with date, time, and basic details
Link from each upcoming session to the event detail page (event_detail.html) where the user can RSVP to the next session
Provide navigation back to the groups listing page (groups_list.html) or to related categories as needed

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Group to display, mapped directly to groupId in getGroupDetails.
Optional encoded URL for a 'Back to listings' link (e.g., the group search results or events list that led here).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an upcoming group session in the group's upcoming events list.
Click a 'Manage my lists' link near the save controls to open the Saved Lists Overview.
After saving the group to a list and choosing to view that list.
Click a 'Back to groups' link when no explicit returnUrl is present.

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs like 'group_detail.html?groupId=grp123' when clicking a group card or an associated group link.
Can be bookmarked or shared as a direct URL to a specific group.

pages.name: Saved Lists Overview
pages.description: Central hub for all of the user's saved lists (e.g., Family Dinner Friday, Emergency Contacts, Weekend Plan, Home Services).
primary_functions: Display a list of all user-created lists including examples like Family Dinner Friday, Emergency Contacts, Weekend Plan, Local Parks, Childcare Options, and Home Services
Allow users to create new empty lists with custom names
Allow users to rename or delete existing lists if they are no longer needed
Provide quick access links into each list's detail page (list_detail.html) to view the items saved in that list
Provide navigation back to the homepage and major content categories

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a list card or name in the lists overview.
Click a 'Back to Home' or logo link from the lists overview.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'My Lists' link in the global header navigation.
Can be accessed directly or from calls to action like 'View all lists' in detail pages.

pages.name: Saved List Detail
pages.description: Detail view of a single saved list, showing all the places, providers, and events that the user has added.
primary_functions: Show the list name (e.g., Family Dinner Friday, Weekend Plan, Emergency Contacts, Home Services, Childcare Options, Local Parks) and allow the user to rename it
Display all items saved to this list with basic info (name, type such as restaurant, plumber, park, event, rating, key tags)
Link each saved item back to its appropriate detail page (place_detail.html or event_detail.html) for deeper information
Allow users to remove individual items from the list or clear the list entirely
Optionally allow users to reorder items (e.g., prioritize a chosen restaurant or preferred plumber) for their own planning

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the SavedList to display, mapped to listId in getSavedListDetail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved item whose item_type is 'place' (e.g., restaurant, plumber, park, childcare provider).
Click on a saved item whose item_type is 'event' (e.g., a Saturday event or volunteering opportunity).
Click on a saved item whose item_type is 'group' (e.g., a yoga group).
Click a 'Back to all lists' link from the list detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessed via URLs like 'list_detail.html?listId=list123' when navigating from the lists overview or after saving an item to a list.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the purpose of the local community guide and how it is curated.
primary_functions: Explain the mission and scope of the community guide and directory
Describe what kinds of listings (restaurants, services, events, volunteering, parks, groups, childcare) the site includes
Reassure users about data sources, review practices, and how ratings are presented
Provide links back to main content sections and the Help page for usage instructions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Learn how to use the site' link within the About content.
Click on a 'Back to Home' link within the About content.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the global footer navigation.
Can be visited directly via 'about.html' for information about the guide.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for users to contact the site owner or administrator about general questions or feedback.
primary_functions: Provide a simple contact form where users can send feedback, suggest corrections, or request new features
Display site contact information such as email or mailing address if appropriate
Confirm form submissions so users know their message has been received
Offer links back to the Help page and main navigation to continue browsing

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line prefilled in the contact form (e.g., 'Feature request' or 'Bug report').
Optional flag set to true after a successful form submission to show a confirmation message.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View help & how it works' link after submitting or reading contact info.
After successfully calling submitSiteContactMessage, reload the page with submitted=true to display a success state.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the global footer navigation.
Can be linked directly (e.g., from emails) as 'contact.html' for feedback or support.
The page receives form submissions via submitSiteContactMessage without navigating away.

pages.name: Help / How It Works
pages.description: Guidance on how to use filters, save items to lists, and complete common tasks on the site.
primary_functions: Explain how to search and filter listings by ZIP code, radius, price, rating, amenities, date, and time
Describe how to save places, providers, events, and volunteering opportunities into custom lists like Family Dinner Friday or Emergency Contacts
Explain how to join groups, RSVP to sessions, and contact organizers via event and volunteering detail pages
Provide troubleshooting tips for common issues (e.g., no results, understanding filters) and link to the Contact page for further help

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Still need help? Contact us' link.
Click on a 'Back to Home' or 'Start exploring' link in the Help content.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help & How It Works' link in the global footer navigation.
Can be visited directly to understand how to perform key tasks such as saving lists or RSVP'ing.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the local community guide.
primary_functions: Present terms of use, including responsibilities and limitations for using directory information
Explain any disclaimers regarding provider quality, availability, and pricing information
Outline user responsibilities when contacting providers, attending events, or joining groups
Provide links back to the Privacy Policy and main navigation

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View Privacy Policy' link inside the Terms content.
Click on a 'Back to Home' link from the Terms page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms' link in the global footer navigation.
Can be linked directly as 'terms.html' for legal references.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about how user data and preferences are handled.
primary_functions: Explain what data is collected about user activity, saved lists, and preferences
Describe how data is stored, used, and protected in the context of a single-user experience
Describe any cookie or tracking practices and how users can manage them
Link back to the Terms & Conditions and main site sections

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View Terms & Conditions' link within the Privacy content.
Click on a 'Back to Home' link from the Privacy page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy' link in the global footer navigation.
Can be linked directly as 'privacy.html' for privacy inquiries and compliance.

header_links.description: Local restaurants, cafes, and family-friendly dining options
Nearby parks, playgrounds, and outdoor spaces
Plumbers, electricians, cleaners, gardeners and other home services
View and manage all saved lists

footer_links.description: Contact the site owner or administrator
Instructions and FAQs for using the site
